description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy resembling a bear, with a soft, knitted-texture fabric in a muted blue color. The bear has round ears, black button-like eyes, and a small black nose, with a stitched mouth showing two small white teeth. Its belly is a brown patch adorned with five pink heart shapes and bordered by visible black stitching, adding a handmade charm. The hands and feet have pink circular patches, and the cheeks are highlighted with subtle pink blush spots. The back of the toy is plain blue, with no additional markings or features. The overall appearance is cuddly and inviting, suitable for children or as a decorative item in urban parks or playgrounds.
description: A blue plush bear with a brown heart-patched belly, pink accents, and a stitched mouth with small teeth. It has a soft, knitted texture and a friendly, handmade look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bear's face, brown heart-patched belly, pink cheeks, and all four limbs with pink accents.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the bear's profile, rounded ear, protruding nose, and the thickness of its limbs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain blue back, rounded ears, and the back of the arms and legs without any decorative patches.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the face, ear, and the side of the brown belly patch.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral with a slight hint of friendliness, featuring round black eyes and a small stitched mouth with two visible white teeth. The pink blush on the cheeks adds a gentle, approachable look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with arms slightly outstretched and legs spread apart, head facing forward.
